chapter_title.ar: باب قَبَالَةِ الْأَرَضِينَ وَ الْمُزَارَعَةِ بِالنِّصْفِ وَ الثُّلُثِ وَ الرُّبُعِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 127 – Guaranteeing the lands and the crops with the half (of the produce), and the third, and the quarter

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/345)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/345)
text: لَا تُقَبِّلِ الْأَرْضَ بِحِنْطَةٍ مُسَمَّاةٍ وَ لَكِنْ بِالنِّصْفِ وَ الثُّلُثِ وَ الرُّبُعِ وَ الْخُمُسِ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِ وَ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِالْمُزَارَعَةِ بِالثُّلُثِ وَ الرُّبُعِ وَ الْخُمُسِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al halby,

from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Do not accept the land with the specified wheat, but (accepting) with the third (of the produce), and the quarter, and the fifth, there is no problem with it’. And he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem with sharing the crops with the third, and the quarter, and the fifth’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Land cannot be accepted for specified wheat, however, it is accepted for one-half, one-third, one-fourth or one-fifth.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Sharecropping for one-third, one for-fourth or one-fifth is not unlawful.’”
